div.p: Push, Pop, and Peek with stack_top Pointer Semantics

g.text: KEY CONVENTION: stack_top Points to NEXT Free Slot

div.p: Empty Check: stack_top == 0 Full Check: stack_top == STACK_MAX Count: stack_top directly gives depth
⚠️ OVERFLOW RISK Push when stack_top >= STACK_MAX: → Runtime Error: "Stack overflow" → Program terminates
⚠️ UNDERFLOW RISK Pop when stack_top <= 0: → Runtime Error: "Stack underflow" → Program terminates
PUSH(value): c stack[stack_top] = value; // Store at next free slot stack_top++; // Advance pointer
POP(): c stack_top--; // Retreat pointer return stack[stack_top]; // Read from now-free slot
